diary_entries.entry: Year 55 on Mars. Subsurface ice deposit found. Morale is hopeful. We have 638 food units left.
Population: 27. Subsurface ice deposit found. I spent the year on mediation. Closest to Selene-1.
Another year. Subsurface ice deposit found. The colony feels hopeful. My empathy grows stronger.

meta_awareness: Ares (year 55): 'The sub-sim predicted our decision before we made it. Does that mean our decisions are predictable too — from above?'
